title: Fix blank PDF workspace in fullscreen (dbg95)
description:
PDF Viewer in fullscreen now loads split-piece plans (per-page storageKey) when no whole-archive storageKey exists — most imported PDFs use split pieces. Also fixes double-render aborting the viewer mount on open.

Who is affected: OVH PipeSync Plan view fullscreen workflow.
changeLog: Continuous PDF viewer: per-piece load when archive key missing.
Remove duplicate render on fullscreen open (mount no longer aborted).
Toast when PDF source or read-url fails.
